goals.title: Release Baton v0.6.0
goals.objective: Publish the approved current Baton implementation as the stable v0.6.0 release and finish clean on main.
goals.context: The user approved exact commit d1b3e7b3f7cc6af741f8323424a0d2e0eb74d49f and its validated five-asset set, requiring only main to remain locally and remotely after completion.
